title: carolus chlorocarpus
intro: Carolus chlorocarpus, also known as the green fruit carob tree, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation, due to the presence of flavonoids and polyphenols. The health benefits of Carolus chlorocarpus include its potential to reduce the risk of heart disease, improve digestion, and act as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
